summary: No changes were detected between the old and new versions of the Perplexity AI Legal Policies document. The policy remains identical to its previous version.
analysis:
1) **What specifically changed?**
No changes were found between the provided 'OLD CONTENT' and 'NEW CONTENT' versions of the Perplexity AI Legal Policies. The text is identical in both documents.

2) **Who is affected?**
Since no changes were made, no users are affected by any policy alterations. The terms of service for all users (platform users, enterprise & developer users, free trial users, Perplexity Pro subscribers, etc.) remain as they were previously.

3) **Whether this impacts user rights, data privacy, or liability?**
As there are no changes, there is no impact on user rights, data privacy, or liability. All previous conditions, disclaimers, rights granted, and limitations continue to apply.

4) **Any action required?**
No action is required from users or the Company, as the policy has not been updated.
